info.title: PythonAnywhere API
info.description: PythonAnywhere API for managing consoles, files, web apps, scheduled tasks, always-on tasks, databases, system image, and more.

get.description: Returns daily CPU usage limit, next reset time, and current total usage in seconds.

daily_cpu_total_usage_seconds.description: Current daily CPU usage in seconds

get.summary: Get latest output from a console
get.description: Returns approximately the last 500 characters of console output.

input.description: Input to send to the console

get.summary: Download a file or list directory contents

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Absolute path to the file or directory

post.description: Upload or update a file. Returns 201 for new files, 200 for updated files.

get.description: Returns directory contents, limited to 1000 results.

post.description: Returns 201 for new shares, 200 if already shared.

path.description: Absolute path of file to share

get.summary: Check sharing status of a file

put.description: Replace web app configuration. Requires reload for changes to take effect.

patch.description: Partially update web app configuration. Requires reload for changes to take effect.

get.summary: Get SSL certificate details for a web app

post.summary: Set SSL certificate for a web app
post.description: Set a custom SSL certificate or enable Let's Encrypt auto-renewal.

cert_type.description: Set to 'letsencrypt-auto-renew' for auto Let's Encrypt

delete.summary: Delete SSL certificate for a web app

get.summary: List static file mappings for a web app

post.description: Add a static file mapping. Requires web app restart.

get.summary: Get a specific static file mapping
List static headers for a web app

post.description: Add a static header. Requires web app restart.

url.description: URL path for the static files

path.description: Filesystem path for the static files
